name: tokens
title: Fuse tokens
description: Fuse brand tokens — colors / spacing / borders / typography / radius / shadows / motion. Single source of truth bridging fuse-web docs/brand/colors_and_type.css <-> app/globals.css <-> Tailwind. Sourced from Fuse Design System v21 ZIP. Edit either side; resync next commit (drift-detected at registry-publish time). Publishes plum/sand scales + shadcn semantic tokens (--primary, --foreground, --border, --input distinct per Hard Rule 13) + IPP tier aliases + spacing/radius/shadow/motion + --font-display (Funnel Display 700 — wire via next/font/google in your app's root layout).
